extracted_fields.name: covered_clauses
extracted_fields.value: Preservation of Records; Cooperation; Confidentiality; Use of Name; Tax Indemnification; Employee Benefits Indemnification; Submission to Jurisdiction; Consent to Service of Process; Waiver of Jury Trial; Governing Law
extracted_fields.evidence: Separation Agreement between Enron Corp. and Portland General Electric Company

risks.description: Potential loss of confidentiality protections if disclosure is required by a governmental authority
risks.evidence: If Enron, on the one hand, or PGE, on the other hand, is requested or required to disclose any PGE Confidential Information or Enron Confidential Information, the Person receiving such request or demand shall use all reasonable efforts to provide the other party with written notice

risks.description: Waiver of jury trial may limit legal recourse
risks.impact: Limits ability to pursue jury trial
risks.evidence: THE PARTIES HEREBY IRREVOCABLY AND UNCONDITIONALLY WAIVE, TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, ANY RIGHT THAT THEY MAY HAVE TO TRIAL BY JURY

risks.description: No consequential or punitive damages clause may limit recovery
risks.evidence: No party hereto (or its Affiliates) shall, under any circumstance, be liable to any other party (or its Affiliates) for any consequential, exemplary, special, incidental or punitive damages

risks.description: Tax indemnification exposure may allocate liabilities between the parties.
risks.impact: Potential transfer of tax liabilities between counterparties.

risks.description: Employee benefits indemnification may shift benefits-related liabilities between the parties.
risks.impact: Potential liability allocation for employee benefits obligations.

action_items.due_date: until the earlier of (x) seven (7) years from the date of this Agreement or (y) the closing of the Bankruptcy Cases
action_items.evidence: Each of Enron and PGE shall preserve and keep in its possession all records... and shall make such records and then existing personnel available to the other party

action_items.description: Provide notice of governmental inquiries or investigations
action_items.evidence: each of Enron and PGE shall, and shall cause each of its Subsidiaries to, provide the other party with notice of any governmental inquiries or investigations

action_items.description: Amend organizational documents to remove Enron and Portland General Electric names
action_items.due_date: within 365 days after the date of this Agreement
action_items.evidence: PGE shall, to the extent applicable, amend its organizational documents... to remove the "Enron" name... within three hundred sixty five (365) days thereafter

action_items.description: Amend organizational documents to remove Portland General Electric name
action_items.due_date: within 365 days after the date of this Agreement
action_items.evidence: Enron shall, to the extent applicable, amend its organizational documents... to remove the "Portland General Electric" name... within three hundred and sixty-five (365) days thereafter

action_items.description: Cancel and issue shares of New PGE Common Stock
action_items.due_date: concurrently with the execution and delivery of this Agreement
action_items.evidence: PGE is canceling all shares of PGE Common Stock... and issuing the New PGE Common Stock to Stephen Forbes Cooper LLC and to other Persons pursuant to the Plan

action_items.description: Provide written notice of any request or demand to disclose confidential information
action_items.evidence: the Person receiving such request or demand shall use all reasonable efforts to provide the other party with written notice of such request or demand as promptly as practicable
